entries.detail:
1Ôćĺ# VR Components
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺThis directory contains all VR-related React components for the EduVerse VR educational experiences.
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ## Structure
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ### `/canvas`
     8ÔćĺMain VR canvas wrapper components using React Three Fiber with XR support.
     9Ôćĺ- VRCanvas component with proper sizing and XR mode support
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ### `/scenes`
    12ÔćĺBase VR scene components for loading and displaying 360-degree environments.
    13Ôćĺ- VRScene for 360 equirectangular images
    14Ôćĺ- Camera controls and lighting setup
    15Ôćĺ
    16Ôćĺ### `/hotspots`
    17ÔćĺInteractive hotspot components for information points and navigation.
    18Ôćĺ- Clickable/gazeable hotspots
    19Ôćĺ- Info panel triggers
    20Ôćĺ- Scene navigation points
    21Ôćĺ
    22Ôćĺ### `/ui`
    23ÔćĺVR UI components for user interaction.
    24Ôćĺ- VRInfoPanel - Floating info panels for educational content
    25Ôćĺ- VRNavigation - Navigation system between scenes
    26Ôćĺ- VRControls - Unified control system for headsets, mouse, and touch
    27Ôćĺ
    28Ôćĺ### `/experiences`
    29ÔćĺComplete VR educational experiences organized by subject.
    30Ôćĺ
    31Ôćĺ#### `/experiences/field-trips`
    32ÔćĺEgyptian historical site virtual field trips:
    33Ôćĺ- Pyramids of Giza
    34Ôćĺ- Egyptian Museum
    35Ôćĺ- Abu Simbel Temple
    36Ôćĺ
    37Ôćĺ#### `/experiences/science`
    38Ôćĺ3D science visualizations:
    39Ôćĺ- Solar System
    40Ôćĺ- Human Cell
    41Ôćĺ- Atoms & Molecules
    42Ôćĺ
    43Ôćĺ#### `/experiences/geography`
    44ÔćĺGeography VR experiences:
    45Ôćĺ- Nile River
    46Ôćĺ- Sinai Peninsula
    47Ôćĺ- Egyptian Ecosystems
    48Ôćĺ
    49Ôćĺ### `/fallback`
    50Ôćĺ2D fallback components for browsers without VR support.
    51Ôćĺ- 2D Panorama Viewer
    52Ôćĺ- Static Gallery Mode
    53Ôćĺ- 2D Science Visualizations
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ## Development Guidelines
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ1. All components should support both VR and non-VR modes
    58Ôćĺ2. Use TypeScript with proper types from `src/types/vr.ts`
    59Ôćĺ3. Support Arabic RTL text for bilingual content
    60Ôćĺ4. Implement loading states for assets
    61Ôćĺ5. Follow accessibility best practices
    62Ôćĺ6. Use client-side rendering (dynamic imports) for VR components
    63Ôćĺ

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

entries.detail:
1Ôćĺ# VR UI Components
     2Ôćĺ
     3ÔćĺUser interface components for VR experiences including info panels, navigation menus, and control overlays.
     4Ôćĺ
     5Ôćĺ## Components
     6Ôćĺ
     7Ôćĺ### VRInfoPanel
     8Ôćĺ
     9ÔćĺFloating educational content panel that displays in 3D space.
    10Ôćĺ
    11Ôćĺ**Features:**
    12Ôćĺ- Rich media support (text, images, video, audio)
    13Ôćĺ- Arabic RTL text support
    14Ôćĺ- Dismissible with close button
    15Ôćĺ- Billboard effect (always faces camera)
    16Ôćĺ- Smooth fade-in/out animations
    17Ôćĺ- Responsive sizing
    18Ôćĺ
    19Ôćĺ**Usage:**
    20Ôćĺ
    21Ôćĺ```tsx
    22Ôćĺimport { VRInfoPanel } from '@/components/vr/ui';
    23Ôćĺ
    24Ôćĺfunction MyVRExperience() {
    25Ôćĺ  const [showPanel, setShowPanel] = useState(false);
    26Ôćĺ
    27Ôćĺ  const content = {
    28Ôćĺ    title: {
    29Ôćĺ      en: "The Great Pyramid",
    30Ôćĺ      ar: "ěž┘ä┘çě▒┘ů ěž┘äěú┘âěĘě▒"
    31Ôćĺ    },
    32Ôćĺ    description: {
    33Ôćĺ      en: "Built around 2560 BC, the Great Pyramid of Giza is the oldest and largest of the three pyramids.",
    34Ôćĺ      ar: "ěĘ┘Ć┘ć┘Ő ěş┘łěž┘ä┘Ő ě╣ěž┘ů 2560 ┘éěĘ┘ä ěž┘ä┘ů┘Ő┘äěžě»ěî ěž┘ä┘çě▒┘ů ěž┘äěú┘âěĘě▒ ┘ü┘Ő ěž┘äěČ┘Őě▓ěę ┘ç┘ł ěž┘äěú┘éě»┘ů ┘łěž┘äěú┘âěĘě▒ ┘ů┘ć ěĘ┘Ő┘ć ěž┘äěú┘çě▒ěž┘ůěžě¬ ěž┘äěź┘äěžěźěę."
    35Ôćĺ    },
    36Ôćĺ    imageUrl: "/images/great-pyramid.jpg"
    37Ôćĺ  };
    38Ôćĺ
    39Ôćĺ  return (
    40Ôćĺ    <VRCanvas>
    41Ôćĺ      <VRInfoPanel
    42Ôćĺ        content={content}
    43Ôćĺ        position={{ x: 0, y: 1.6, z: -2 }}
    44Ôćĺ        isVisible={showPanel}
    45Ôćĺ        onClose={() => setShowPanel(false)}
    46Ôćĺ        language="en"
    47Ôćĺ        width={600}
    48Ôćĺ        height={400}
    49Ôćĺ      />
    50Ôćĺ    </VRCanvas>
    51Ôćĺ  );
    52Ôćĺ}
    53Ôćĺ```
    54Ôćĺ
    55Ôćĺ**Props:**
    56Ôćĺ
    57Ôćĺ| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
    58Ôćĺ|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
    59Ôćĺ| `content` | `RichContent` | Yes | - | The content to display (title, description, media) |
    60Ôćĺ| `position` | `HotspotPosition` | Yes | - | 3D position in space (x, y, z) |
    61Ôćĺ| `width` | `number` | No | `600` | Panel width in pixels |
    62Ôćĺ| `height` | `number` | No | `400` | Panel height in pixels |
    63Ôćĺ| `isVisible` | `boolean` | Yes | - | Whether the panel is visible |
    64Ôćĺ| `onClose` | `() => void` | No | - | Callback when panel is closed |
    65Ôćĺ| `language` | `VRLanguage` | No | `'en'` | Display language ('en' or 'ar') |
    66Ôćĺ
    67Ôćĺ**Tips:**
    68Ôćĺ- Position panels at eye level (y: 1.6) for comfortable viewing
    69Ôćĺ- Use z: -2 to -3 for readable distance from camera
    70Ôćĺ- Enable close button with onClose prop for dismissible panels
    71Ôćĺ- For Arabic content, set language="ar" for proper RTL rendering
    72Ôćĺ- Keep content concise for better VR readability
    73Ôćĺ- Use images sparingly to maintain performance
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ### VRNavigation
    76Ôćĺ
    77ÔćĺFloating navigation menu for moving between VR scenes and experiences.
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ**Features:**
    80Ôćĺ- Scene selector menu with thumbnail grid
    81Ôćĺ- Teleportation between viewpoints with transition effects
    82Ôćĺ- Back/Home navigation buttons with history tracking
    83Ôćĺ- Bilingual support (Arabic RTL & English)
    84Ôćĺ- Toggleable menu (open/close)
    85Ôćĺ- Billboard effect (always faces camera)
    86Ôćĺ- Current scene highlighting
    87Ôćĺ- Responsive grid layout
    88Ôćĺ- Disabled state during transitions
    89Ôćĺ
    90Ôćĺ**Usage:**
    91Ôćĺ
    92Ôćĺ```tsx
    93Ôćĺimport { VRNavigation } from '@/components/vr/ui';
    94Ôćĺimport { useState } from 'react';
    95Ôćĺ
    96Ôćĺfunction MyVRExperience() {
    97Ôćĺ  const [activeSceneId, setActiveSceneId] = useState('scene-1');
    98Ôćĺ  const [showNav, setShowNav] = useState(false);
    99Ôćĺ
   100Ôćĺ  return (
   101Ôćĺ    <VRCanvas>
   102Ôćĺ      <VRNavigation
   103Ôćĺ        scenes={vrExperience.scenes}
   104Ôćĺ        currentSceneId={activeSceneId}
   105Ôćĺ        onSceneChange={(sceneId) => setActiveSceneId(sceneId)}
   106Ôćĺ        onExit={() => router.push('/vr-eduverse')}
   107Ôćĺ        language="en"
   108Ôćĺ        position={{ x: -2, y: 2, z: -1 }}
   109Ôćĺ        isOpen={showNav}
   110Ôćĺ        onToggle={() => setShowNav(!showNav)}
   111Ôćĺ        showBackButton={true}
   112Ôćĺ        showHomeButton={true}
   113Ôćĺ      />
   114Ôćĺ    </VRCanvas>
   115Ôćĺ  );
   116Ôćĺ}
   117Ôćĺ```
   118Ôćĺ
   119Ôćĺ**Props:**
   120Ôćĺ
   121Ôćĺ| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
   122Ôćĺ|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
   123Ôćĺ| `scenes` | `VRScene[]` | Yes | - | Array of scenes to display in menu |
   124Ôćĺ| `currentSceneId` | `string` | Yes | - | ID of currently active scene |
   125Ôćĺ| `onSceneChange` | `(sceneId: string) => void` | Yes | - | Callback when scene is selected |
   126Ôćĺ| `onExit` | `() => void` | Yes | - | Callback when exit button is clicked |
   127Ôćĺ| `language` | `VRLanguage` | No | `'en'` | Display language ('en' or 'ar') |
   128Ôćĺ| `position` | `HotspotPosition` | No | `{ x: -2, y: 2, z: -1 }` | 3D position in space |
   129Ôćĺ| `isOpen` | `boolean` | No | `false` | Whether menu is currently open |
   130Ôćĺ| `onToggle` | `() => void` | No | - | Callback when menu is toggled |
   131Ôćĺ| `showBackButton` | `boolean` | No | `true` | Show back navigation button |
   132Ôćĺ| `showHomeButton` | `boolean` | No | `true` | Show home navigation button |
   133Ôćĺ
   134Ôćĺ**Tips:**
   135Ôćĺ- Position navigation menu to the side (x: -2 or 2) to avoid blocking view
   136Ôćĺ- Place at comfortable height (y: 1.8-2.5) for easy access
   137Ôćĺ- Use onToggle to control menu state from keyboard shortcuts
   138Ôćĺ- Back button navigates through scene history
   139Ôćĺ- Home button returns to first scene
   140Ôćĺ- Menu automatically tracks scene history for back navigation
   141Ôćĺ- Transitions are blocked during scene changes to prevent errors
   142Ôćĺ- Current scene is highlighted in green with checkmark
   143Ôćĺ
   144Ôćĺ## Coming Soon
   145Ôćĺ
   146Ôćĺ- VRControls - Control hints overlay
   147Ôćĺ- VRLoadingScreen - Asset loading progress
   148Ôćĺ- VRQuizPanel - Interactive quiz interface
   149Ôćĺ

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
